claim_title: Five raw-data subdirectories are missing DATA_SOURCE_NOTES.md

results.description: Verify all raw-data subdirectories now include DATA_SOURCE_NOTES.md.
results.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
raw = Path("data/raw")
missing = {d.name for d in raw.iterdir() if d.is_dir() and not (d / "DATA_SOURCE_NOTES.md").exists()}
print(f"MISSING_NOTES_COUNT={len(missing)}")
print("MISSING_NOTES=" + ",".join(sorted(missing)))
if len(missing) == 0:
    print("ASSERTION=PASS")
else:
    print("ASSERTION=FAIL")
    raise SystemExit(1)
PY
